zh.lifeSummary: 當John Rhodes於1689年2月12日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可克里斯蒂 邱奇時，他的父親Hezekiah Rhodes I29歲，母親Elizabeth Nichols24歲。他於1708年8月18日與Anne Paine在美國維吉尼亞州米德萊可結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和10個女兒的父母。他去世於1759年1月在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Rhodes于1689年2月12日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可克里斯蒂 邱奇时，他的父亲Hezekiah Rhodes I29岁，母亲Elizabeth Nichols24岁。他于1708年8月18日与Anne Paine在美国弗吉尼亚州米德萊可结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和10个女儿的父母。他去世于1759年1月在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Rhodes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: either a topographic name for someone who lived by ‘(the) woodland clearings’, plural form of Middle English rode (Old English rod, rodu), or a habitational name for someone who came from a place so named, principally Rhodes in Bury (Lancashire) or possibly from one of the many minor places in Yorkshire similarly named, or Rhodes Minnis (Kent). The Yorkshire name sometimes alternates with the singular form (see Rhode and Rode ). The Rh- spelling was introduced in the 16th and 17th centuries by clerks with a classical education, who associated the name with the Greek island of Rhodes, famous in ancient history and mythology. There is also no connection with modern English road (Old English rād ‘riding’), which was not used to denote a thoroughfare until the 16th century. The surname is particularly common in Yorkshire and Lancashire but occurs with various spellings in smaller numbers widely across England.
variant of Rhode , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Rhodus
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of Rhodes or German Rhodius, a Latinized form of Rode , perhaps indicating the personal as opposed to the topographic name (see Rode 1).

variants.name: Rod
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places called Rod, or a topographic name for somene who lived in a woodland clearing, from a derivative of Middle High German roden ‘to clear land for cultivation’. Compare Rhodes .
Norwegian (Rød): habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads so named, from Old Norse ruth ‘clearing’.
Czech and Croatian: from a short form of the Slavic compound personal names based on the element rod ‘family, relatives’, e.g. Rodoslav.

variants.name: Roades
meanings: English: variant of   Rhodes  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Rhode
meanings: English: topographic name from Middle English rode (Old English rod, rodu) designating someone who lived by a woodland clearing, or for someone who came from a place so named, such as Road (Somerset), Rhode (Somerset), Road Farm in Colebrook (Devon), Rhode in Halberton (Devon), Roade (Northamptonshire), Rode (Cheshire), and Rodd (Herefordshire).
English: topographic name for someone who lived by a reed bed, from Middle English rode (Old English hrēod). See also Rude and Trude .
German: habitational name from any places called Rhode (Lower Saxony, Rhineland) and Rhoden (Hesse, Saxony-Anhalt, former Silesia).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Rhodes was born on 12 February 1689, in Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, his father, Hezekiah Rhodes I, was 29 and his mother, Elizabeth Nichols, was 24. He married Anne Paine on 18 August 1708, in Middlesex, Virginia, United States. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 10 daughters. He died in January 1759, in Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Rhodes est né le 12 février 1689, à Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Hezekiah Rhodes I, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Nichols, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Anne Paine le 18 août 1708, à Middlesex, Virginie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 10 filles. Il est décédé en janvier 1759, à Middlesex, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Rhodes am 12. Februar 1689 in Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hezekiah Rhodes I 29 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Nichols 24. Er hat am 18. August 1708 in Middlesex, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten Anne Paine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 10 Töchter. Er starb im Januar 1759 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Rhodes è nato il il 12 febbraio 1689 nel Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Hezekiah Rhodes I, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Nichols, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Anne Paine il 18 agosto 1708, nel Middlesex, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 10 figlie. Morì nel gennaio 1759, nel Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Rhodesが1689年2月12日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ミッドレセックスチリスト チャーチで生まれた時，父Hezekiah Rhodes Iは29歳，母Elizabeth Nicholsは24歳であった。1708年8月18日にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州ミッドレセックスでAnne Paineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と10人の娘の親であった。彼は1759年1月にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ミッドレセックスで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Rhodes(이)가 1689년 2월 12일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 미들레세스 크리스트 처르치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hezekiah Rhodes I(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Nichols(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1708년 8월 18일 미국 버지니아 주 미들레세스에서 Anne Paine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1759년 1월 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 미들레세스에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Rhodes nasceu em 12 de fevereiro de 1689, em Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, seu pai, Hezekiah Rhodes I, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Nichols, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Paine em 18 de agosto de 1708, em Middlesex, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 10 filhas. Ele faleceu em janeiro de 1759, em Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Rhodes родился 12 февраля 1689 г. в местности краист чурч, миддлесекс, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Hezekiah Rhodes I было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Nichols, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Paine 18 августа 1708 г. в местности миддлесекс, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 10 дочерей. Он умер январь 1759 г. в местности миддлесекс, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Rhodes nació el 12 de febrero de 1689, en Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, su papá, Hezekiah Rhodes I, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Nichols, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Anne Paine el 18 de agosto de 1708, en Middlesex, Virginia, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 10 hijas. Murió en enero de 1759, en Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, a la edad de 69 años.
